login.author: ADR-008 v0.1.5
login.description: Email + password + sign-in primary button, with secondary action (register / forgot).
login.corpus_coverage_note: Dank has login-shaped screens but the components/screen_component_instances tables are empty in the current DB snapshot; corpus-mining deferred to v0.2.

settings.author: ADR-008 v0.1.5
settings.description: Profile edit card + toggle_group for preferences + navigation_row list + save button.
settings.corpus_coverage_note: Dank has settings-adjacent screens; not yet mined.

feed.author: ADR-008 v0.1.5
feed.description: Scrolling list of cards: avatar + text + image + button_group (upvote / share / comment).
feed.corpus_coverage_note: Wallet/finance app doesn't feature meme feeds; hand-authored from Mobbin pattern.

dashboard.author: ADR-008 v0.1.5
dashboard.description: Tabs + chart card + table card. Table uses list_item rows with badges.
dashboard.corpus_coverage_note: Dank's transaction-history screens are dashboard-shaped; not yet mined.

paywall.author: ADR-008 v0.1.5
paywall.description: Hero + three pricing-tier cards (each with feature list + CTA) + testimonial.
paywall.corpus_coverage_note: Standard SaaS paywall; hand-authored from canonical taxonomy.

search.author: ADR-008 v0.1.5
search.description: Header with search_input + filter tabs + recent / popular chip group + results list.
search.corpus_coverage_note: Dank has a search screen variant; not yet mined.

drawer-nav.author: ADR-008 v0.1.5
drawer-nav.description: Drawer containing user header + 6 navigation rows + sign-out button.
drawer-nav.corpus_coverage_note: Dank has drawer menus but the node tree is flat-typed; hand-authored to surface structure.

onboarding-carousel.author: ADR-008 v0.1.5
onboarding-carousel.description: 3 card slides (image + heading + body) + segmented_control pagination + primary CTA + skip link.

profile.author: ADR-008 v0.1.5
profile.description: Header + hero card (avatar + heading + bio + follow/message buttons) + stats list + tabs. Not tied to a canonical prompt; covers 'profile' classifier route.
profile.corpus_coverage_note: Generic Mobbin profile pattern; v0.2 should validate against Dank profile screens.

chat.author: ADR-008 v0.1.5
chat.description: Header + scrolling list of message bubbles (alternating avatar-prefixed and text-only) + composer row. Not tied to a canonical prompt.

empty-state.author: ADR-008 v0.1.5
empty-state.description: Header + empty_state block (image + heading + body + primary CTA + secondary link). Covers 'nothing to show' screens.

detail.author: ADR-008 v0.1.5
detail.description: Header + hero card (image + heading + body) + spec-list card + primary/secondary action row. Covers product/article/item detail.
detail.corpus_coverage_note: Standard detail pattern; hand-authored. Used for 12-round-trip-test fallback when the clarification refusal fires.
